sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52026" key="kairi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καιρία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52026.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">tape</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cord</tr_> used for ligatures, etc., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:47:13:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.13.7</biblScope></bibl>, Heraclasib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.1.1</biblScope></bibl>. (From <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κείρεσθαι</foreign> or <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καῖρος</foreign> acc. to Sch. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4p.537D" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4p.537D.</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κειρία</foreign>.)</sense> </entryFree>
